name: Realm FM
explanation: An FM-plus-filter hybrid synth in the Yamaha SY77 / SY99 'RCM' lineage. Where a pure FM synth is all operators, Realm FM runs a two-operator FM carrier through a resonant analog-style low-pass with its own envelope, pairing digital FM with subtractive shaping. Ratio and Index set the FM timbre; Cutoff and Env Amount sweep the filter for the evolving, vocal RCM character; Decay sets the amp contour. 8-voice poly. Controls: Ratio, Index, Cutoff, Env Amount, Decay and Level.
